title: Domain Promotion Ledger v1
description:
Append-only JSONL ledger recording domain-promotion governance events (spec §15.5 'Promotion path', v2.5 — S10-DOMAIN-PROMOTION). Three entry kinds: `promotion` (successful weight change), `rollback` (reversal of a prior promotion), `failed-attempt` (audit failed; registry unchanged; recorded for historical trail).

Each line in the JSONL file is one entry. Readers reconstruct promotion state by folding the stream chronologically. Writes happen via `abv-run promote` / `abv-run rollback`; the CLI enforces schema compliance + ABV_OPERATOR env guard. Never edit entries in place — corrections are new entries superseding old ones (append-only discipline).

domain.description: Name of the domain being promoted (e.g., 'agent-behavior').

registry_path.description: Path to the brain-registry.json that was mutated.

rebalance_strategy.description: How other domains were rebalanced to preserve sum=1.0. `proportional` = each existing non-zero domain trimmed by a uniform factor. `explicit` = operator supplied per-domain deltas. `none` = no rebalance applied (only valid when the sum was already correct post-change).

rebalance_deltas.description: Full before/after weights for every domain in the registry. Enables exact rollback + historical reconstruction.

audit_reports.description: Paths to ≥ 2 calibrate report JSON files (e.g., Haiku runs).

sonnet_audit_report.description: Path to the higher-fidelity validation calibrate report.

red_mode_reports.description: Optional paths to mock-bad-agent red-mode reports supporting the audit.

operator.description: Operator handle from ABV_OPERATOR env; self-asserted in v1.

notes.description: Operator-supplied prose documenting the decision context.

registry_backup_path.description: Path to the pre-promotion registry backup.

supersedes_ts.description: ts of the promotion entry this rollback reverses.

restored_weights.description: Full weight set after the rollback — should match the `before` side of the superseded promotion's rebalance_deltas.

reason.description: Operator-supplied rationale for the rollback (e.g., 'post-promotion swing blocker sustained for 7 days').

registry_path.description: Path to the registry the audit was targeting. Registry is NOT mutated on a failed attempt.

intended_to_weight.description: The weight the audit was targeting (captured for posterity).

failure_classification.description: Which branch of the runbook's failure classification applies.

failure_reason.description: Prose explaining what failed and how — context for future remediation.

audit_reports.description: Paths to the audit reports that produced the failing signal.

notes.description: Operator prose on next-steps (e.g., remediation task id spawned).
